title: Present Perfect или Past Simple
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Complete the sentences: 1) I ___ (lose) my keys, so I can't open the door. 2) We ___ (visit) Prague in 2023. 3) ___ you ever ___ (try) scuba diving? 4) She ___ (not finish) the report yet.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) have lost; 2) visited; 3) Have, tried; 4) hasn't finished.
criteria: Present Perfect for a present result, life experience and yet
Past Simple for a finished time in 2023
common_errors: using Present Perfect with a finished date

title: First и Second Conditional
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Complete and classify the conditionals: 1) If the weather ___ (improve), we ___ (go) hiking tomorrow. 2) If I ___ (be) the team leader, I ___ (change) the schedule. 3) What would you do if you ___ (miss) an important deadline?

rubric.reference_answer: 1) improves, will go — First Conditional; 2) were, would change — Second Conditional; 3) missed.
criteria: present form after if in First Conditional
past form and would in Second Conditional
distinguishes realistic future from hypothetical present/future

title: Active to Passive
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Rewrite in the passive without changing the tense: 1) Researchers developed the vaccine in 2020. 2) The company is testing a new payment system. 3) Someone has stolen my bicycle. 4) They will announce the results tomorrow.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) The vaccine was developed in 2020. 2) A new payment system is being tested. 3) My bicycle has been stolen. 4) The results will be announced tomorrow.
common_errors: using past simple in every sentence

title: Reported Speech
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Report the statements as if you were speaking the next day: 1) Maya said, ‘I am working from home today.’ 2) Leo said, ‘I finished the task yesterday.’ 3) Nina asked, ‘Have you seen this document?’
starter_code:
1) Maya said that ...
2) Leo said that ...
3) Nina asked ...

rubric.reference_answer: 1) Maya said that she was working from home that day. 2) Leo said that he had finished the task the day before. 3) Nina asked whether/if I had seen that document.
criteria: backshift after a past reporting verb
reported yes/no question uses if or whether and statement order

title: Must, might или can’t
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Choose must, might/could or can't: 1) The lights are off and nobody answers; they ___ be at home. 2) Her car is outside; she ___ be in the office. 3) I am not sure, but the email ___ be in the spam folder. 4) He knew the confidential details; someone ___ have told him.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) can't; 2) must; 3) might/could; 4) must have.
criteria: modal + have + past participle for past deduction
common_errors: must told instead of must have told

title: Relative Clauses
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Combine the sentences with a relative clause and add commas where needed: 1) The woman designed the app. She won an award. 2) My laptop is five years old. It still works perfectly. 3) The café serves vegan food. We met there.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) The woman who designed the app won an award. 2) My laptop, which is five years old, still works perfectly. 3) The café where we met serves vegan food.

title: Gerund или Infinitive
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Complete the sentences: 1) I remember ___ (meet) her before. 2) Remember ___ (send) the invoice. 3) He stopped ___ (smoke) last year. 4) He stopped ___ (buy) some water.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) meeting; 2) to send; 3) smoking; 4) to buy.
criteria: remember doing refers to a memory
remember to do refers to a future duty
stop to do means pause another action for a purpose
common_errors: treating gerund and infinitive as interchangeable

title: Articles in Context
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Insert a/an, the or —: ‘Last summer I took ___ train to ___ Netherlands. ___ journey took six hours. I spent most of my time looking at ___ beautiful countryside. ___ travel can teach us a lot about other cultures.’

rubric.reference_answer: a train; the Netherlands; The journey; the beautiful countryside; — travel.
criteria: a for first mention of a singular countable noun
the for a specific previously established journey/countryside
zero article for travel in general
common_errors: the travel for a general concept

title: Связный аргумент B2
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Write 90–120 words: ‘Should university attendance be optional?’ Use at least four different linking devices for contrast, reason, result and conclusion. Underline or list the linkers after the paragraph.

rubric.reference_answer: Any coherent 90–120 word argument that uses accurate B2 linkers such as however/although, because/since, therefore/as a result, and in conclusion/overall.
criteria: at least four accurate linkers with different functions

title: Formal Email to a Course Coordinator
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Write a 120–150 word email to a course coordinator. You missed a presentation because of illness. Explain the situation, ask for an alternative date and offer evidence. Use an appropriate subject line, greeting and closing.

rubric.reference_answer: A polite formal email with a clear subject, reason for absence, specific request for another date, offer of a medical certificate, and an appropriate closing.

title: Present Perfect: маркеры времени
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Choose Present Perfect or Past Simple: 1) I ___ (not see) Alex since Monday. 2) She ___ (call) me two hours ago. 3) We ___ already ___ (send) the documents. 4) They ___ (move) here in 2021.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) haven't seen; 2) called; 3) have already sent; 4) moved.
criteria: Present Perfect with since and already
Past Simple with ago and in 2021
common_errors: Past Simple with since for an unfinished period

title: Present Perfect: мини-диалог
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Complete the dialogue: A: ___ you ___ (finish) the report yet? B: Yes, I ___ (send) it at 9 a.m. A: Great. I ___ never ___ (write) one so quickly. B: I ___ (learn) the format during last month's workshop.

rubric.reference_answer: Have you finished; sent; have never written; learned/learnt.
criteria: Present Perfect with yet and never
Past Simple with a precise time and finished workshop

title: Conditionals: планы и советы
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Complete: 1) If the client ___ (approve) the draft, we ___ (publish) it tomorrow. 2) If I ___ (have) more experience, I ___ (apply) for the role. 3) What ___ you ___ (do) if the server failed?

rubric.reference_answer: 1) approves, will publish; 2) had, would apply; 3) would, do.
criteria: First Conditional for a realistic plan

title: Conditionals: исправление ошибок
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Correct the sentences: 1) If it will rain, we will cancel the event. 2) If I would know the answer, I would tell you. 3) If she were more organised, she will meet every deadline.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) If it rains, we will cancel the event. 2) If I knew the answer, I would tell you. 3) If she were more organised, she would meet every deadline.
criteria: Present Simple after if in First Conditional
Past Simple after if in Second Conditional

title: Passive Voice: рабочие процессы
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Rewrite in the passive: 1) The team reviews every application. 2) Engineers are repairing the bridge. 3) The editor had checked the article before publication. 4) They may postpone the launch.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) Every application is reviewed. 2) The bridge is being repaired. 3) The article had been checked before publication. 4) The launch may be postponed.

title: Passive Voice: смешанные времена
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Complete with the correct passive form: 1) The package ___ just ___ (deliver). 2) The road ___ (close) when we arrived. 3) New rules ___ (introduce) next month. 4) The issue must ___ (solve) today.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) has just been delivered; 2) was closed; 3) will be introduced; 4) be solved.

title: Reported Speech: просьбы и вопросы
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Report the sentences: 1) 'Please send me the file,' Ada said to Ben. 2) 'Where did you put the keys?' Tom asked me. 3) 'I will call you tomorrow,' Mia said.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) Ada asked Ben to send her the file. 2) Tom asked me where I had put the keys. 3) Mia said that she would call me the next day.

title: Reported Speech: новости команды
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Rewrite as reported speech one day later: 1) 'We have completed this stage,' the manager said. 2) 'Can you join the meeting today?' she asked me. 3) 'Do not share these figures,' he told us.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) The manager said that they had completed that stage. 2) She asked me if/whether I could join the meeting that day. 3) He told us not to share those figures.

title: Modals of Deduction: что произошло
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Choose must have, might have or can't have: 1) The ground is wet; it ___ rained. 2) She was abroad, so she ___ attended the meeting. 3) I am unsure; they ___ taken an earlier train.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) must have; 2) can't have; 3) might/could have.

title: Modals of Deduction: детектив
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Complete: 1) The door was locked from inside, so the visitor ___ have entered through it. 2) There are fresh footprints; someone ___ be nearby. 3) The note is unclear; it ___ refer to another address.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) can't; 2) must; 3) might/could.

title: Relative Clauses: люди и места
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Combine: 1) I spoke to a designer. She created the logo. 2) Kyoto attracts many visitors. I studied there. 3) Our guide was excellent. His name was Omar.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) I spoke to the designer who created the logo. 2) Kyoto, where I studied, attracts many visitors. 3) Our guide, whose name was Omar, was excellent.

title: Relative Clauses: пунктуация и смысл
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Add a relative word and commas where necessary: 1) Employees ___ work remotely need secure access. 2) My manager ___ lives in Leeds visits monthly. 3) The room ___ we hold interviews has been renovated.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) Employees who work remotely need secure access. 2) My manager, who lives in Leeds, visits monthly. 3) The room where/in which we hold interviews has been renovated.

title: Gerund и Infinitive: планы и привычки
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Complete: 1) She avoided ___ (answer) the question. 2) We agreed ___ (meet) on Friday. 3) I regret ___ (tell) you that the event is cancelled. 4) I regret ___ (say) those words yesterday.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) answering; 2) to meet; 3) to tell; 4) saying.
criteria: regret to do for current bad news
regret doing for a past action

title: Gerund и Infinitive: изменение смысла
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Choose the form that fits the stated meaning: 1) Please stop ___ (talk) — end the activity. 2) We stopped ___ (check) the map — paused another activity for this purpose. 3) Try ___ (restart) the router — experiment with a possible solution. 4) Try ___ (arrive) earlier — make an effort.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) talking; 2) to check; 3) restarting; 4) to arrive.
criteria: stop doing versus stop to do
try to do as an effort
common_errors: choosing by form without considering meaning

title: Articles: первое и повторное упоминание
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Insert a/an, the or —: ‘Yesterday I took ___ train to Brighton. ___ train was crowded. We had lunch near ___ sea. ___ food was excellent. ___ travel often changes how people see the world.’

rubric.reference_answer: a train; The train; the sea; The food; — travel.
criteria: the for repeated or situationally specific nouns
zero article for travel as a general concept
common_errors: the travel for a general idea

title: Articles: страны и общие понятия
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Insert a/an, the or —: ‘___ Japan and ___ United States have different school systems. ___ education shapes society. I read ___ report about the topic, and ___ report compared three countries.’

rubric.reference_answer: — Japan; the United States; — education; a report; the report.
criteria: zero article for education in general
a then the for first and repeated mention
common_errors: the education as a general concept

title: Связный аргумент: онлайн-лекции
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Write 80–100 words: ‘Should recorded lectures replace some live lectures?’ Use one linker for contrast, one for reason, one for result and one for conclusion.

rubric.reference_answer: A coherent 80–100 word argument with accurate contrast, reason, result and conclusion linkers.

title: Связный аргумент: редактирование
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Rewrite as a coherent paragraph using however, because, as a result and overall: ‘Group work can be useful. Some students do all the work. Roles are often unclear. Teachers should define responsibilities. Group work can develop communication skills.’

rubric.reference_answer: Any coherent rewrite that uses all four linkers with correct punctuation and logical relations.
criteria: as a result gives a consequence
common_errors: however between two clauses without punctuation
because and as a result expressing the same direction incorrectly

title: Formal Email: перенос собеседования
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Write a 100–130 word formal email to reschedule a university interview. Give a reason, propose two alternative times and apologise for the inconvenience.

rubric.reference_answer: A polite email containing the reason, two concrete alternatives, an apology, a subject line, greeting and closing.

title: Formal Email: жалоба на курс
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Write a 130–160 word formal email about repeated technical problems in an online course. Describe two problems, explain their impact and request a specific solution.
starter_code:
Subject: ...
Dear Support Team,

...

Yours faithfully,
...

rubric.reference_answer: A structured formal complaint with two concrete problems, their impact, a specific remedy, appropriate subject, greeting and closing.

title: Present Perfect и Past Simple: поездка
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Complete: 1) I ___ already ___ (book) the tickets. 2) We ___ (meet) the guide yesterday. 3) She ___ (live) in Rome since 2021. 4) ___ you ___ (see) him last night?

rubric.reference_answer: 1) have already booked; 2) met; 3) has lived; 4) Did, see.
criteria: Present Perfect связан с настоящим или незавершённым периодом
Past Simple относится к завершённому времени
common_errors: Past Simple с yet или since

title: Present Perfect и Past Simple: рабочая переписка
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Complete: 1) He ___ (not reply) yet. 2) I ___ (send) the file on Monday. 3) We ___ (know) each other for ten years. 4) The printer ___ (break) last week.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) hasn't replied; 2) sent; 3) have known; 4) broke.
criteria: Present Perfect связан с настоящим или незавершённым периодом
Past Simple относится к завершённому времени
common_errors: Past Simple с yet или since

title: Present Perfect и Past Simple: карьера
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Complete: 1) She ___ just ___ (complete) the course. 2) They ___ (launch) the product in 2024. 3) I ___ never ___ (work) abroad. 4) Ben ___ (join) the team two months ago.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) has just completed; 2) launched; 3) have never worked; 4) joined.
criteria: Present Perfect связан с настоящим или незавершённым периодом
Past Simple относится к завершённому времени
common_errors: Past Simple с yet или since

title: Present Perfect и Past Simple: опыт
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Complete: 1) Mia ___ (go) out, so she is unavailable now. 2) She ___ (return) an hour ago. 3) ___ you ever ___ (take) a night train? 4) I ___ (not enjoy) my first flight when I was sixteen.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) has gone; 2) returned; 3) Have, taken; 4) didn't enjoy.
criteria: Present Perfect связан с настоящим или незавершённым периодом
Past Simple относится к завершённому времени
common_errors: Past Simple с yet или since

title: Present Perfect и Past Simple: результаты
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Complete: 1) We ___ (write) three reports so far. 2) I ___ (write) the summary last month. 3) The parcel ___ (not arrive) yet. 4) The workshop ___ (start) on Tuesday.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) have written; 2) wrote; 3) hasn't arrived; 4) started.
criteria: Present Perfect связан с настоящим или незавершённым периодом
Past Simple относится к завершённому времени
common_errors: Past Simple с yet или since

title: Present Perfect и Past Simple: изменения
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Complete: 1) I ___ (work) here since May. 2) The company ___ (change) its policy in 2022. 3) Our results ___ recently ___ (improve). 4) Lara ___ (not attend) yesterday's meeting.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) have worked; 2) changed; 3) have recently improved; 4) didn't attend.
criteria: Present Perfect связан с настоящим или незавершённым периодом
Past Simple относится к завершённому времени
common_errors: Past Simple с yet или since

title: Условные предложения: планы
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Complete: 1) If it ___ (rain), we ___ (stay) home. 2) If I ___ (have) more time, I ___ (learn) Italian. 3) If you heat ice, it ___ (melt). 4) If she ___ (call), tell me.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) rains, will stay; 2) had, would learn; 3) melts; 4) calls.

title: Условные предложения: работа
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Complete: 1) If we ___ (finish) early, we ___ (send) the draft today. 2) If I ___ (be) you, I ___ (ask) for feedback. 3) Unless he ___ (hurry), he ___ (miss) the train. 4) Water boils if it ___ (reach) 100°C.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) finish, will send; 2) were, would ask; 3) hurries, will miss; 4) reaches.

title: Условные предложения: учёба
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Complete: 1) If Nina ___ (revise), she ___ (pass) the exam. 2) If classes ___ (be) smaller, students ___ (get) more feedback. 3) If you mix blue and yellow, you ___ (get) green. 4) What ___ you ___ (do) if you lost your notes?

rubric.reference_answer: 1) revises, will pass; 2) were, would get; 3) get; 4) would, do.

title: Условные предложения: путешествие
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Complete: 1) If the flight ___ (be) delayed, we ___ (take) the train. 2) If I ___ (speak) Japanese, I ___ (travel) alone. 3) If you ___ (not book) now, prices will rise. 4) Plants die if they ___ (not get) water.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) is, will take; 2) spoke, would travel; 3) don't book; 4) don't get.

title: Условные предложения: продукт
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Complete: 1) If users ___ (like) the demo, we ___ (build) the feature. 2) If the budget ___ (be) larger, we ___ (hire) a designer. 3) If you press this button, the app ___ (restart). 4) I would test again if the error ___ (appear).

rubric.reference_answer: 1) like, will build; 2) were, would hire; 3) restarts; 4) appeared.

title: Условные предложения: экология
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Complete: 1) If cities ___ (improve) transport, pollution ___ (fall). 2) If I ___ (own) a car, I still ___ (cycle) to work. 3) Ice melts if the temperature ___ (rise). 4) Unless we ___ (act), the problem ___ (grow).

rubric.reference_answer: 1) improve, will fall; 2) owned, would cycle; 3) rises; 4) act, will grow.

title: Passive Voice: музей
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Rewrite in the passive: 1) They built the museum in 1998. 2) Experts are restoring the main hall. 3) Someone has damaged the door. 4) They will reopen it in June.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) The museum was built in 1998. 2) The main hall is being restored. 3) The door has been damaged. 4) It will be reopened in June.

title: Passive Voice: сервис
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Rewrite in the passive: 1) The team updates the database daily. 2) Engineers are fixing the server. 3) They sent the warning yesterday. 4) Someone had deleted the backup.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) The database is updated daily. 2) The server is being fixed. 3) The warning was sent yesterday. 4) The backup had been deleted.

title: Passive Voice: исследование
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Rewrite in the passive: 1) Scientists collected the samples. 2) They have published the results. 3) The lab will repeat the experiment. 4) Reviewers are checking the paper.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) The samples were collected. 2) The results have been published. 3) The experiment will be repeated. 4) The paper is being checked.

title: Passive Voice: мероприятие
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Rewrite in the passive: 1) Volunteers organise the festival. 2) They cancelled two concerts. 3) The organisers have added a workshop. 4) They will stream the final online.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) The festival is organised by volunteers. 2) Two concerts were cancelled. 3) A workshop has been added. 4) The final will be streamed online.

title: Passive Voice: доставка
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Rewrite in the passive: 1) The courier delivered the parcel. 2) Staff are packing the orders. 3) They have changed the address. 4) The company will refund the fee.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) The parcel was delivered by the courier. 2) The orders are being packed. 3) The address has been changed. 4) The fee will be refunded by the company.

title: Passive Voice: образование
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Rewrite in the passive: 1) Tutors assess every project. 2) They recorded the lecture yesterday. 3) The school has introduced a new course. 4) Teachers are preparing the materials.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) Every project is assessed by tutors. 2) The lecture was recorded yesterday. 3) A new course has been introduced. 4) The materials are being prepared.

title: Reported Speech: проект
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Report the statements: 1) Ava said, ‘I am testing the app.’ 2) Max said, ‘I finished it yesterday.’ 3) Eva asked, ‘Do you need help?’ 4) Tom said, ‘I will call tomorrow.’

rubric.reference_answer: 1) Ava said that she was testing the app. 2) Max said that he had finished it the day before. 3) Eva asked if/whether I needed help. 4) Tom said that he would call the next day.

title: Reported Speech: поездка
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Report the statements: 1) Leo said, ‘I have lost my ticket.’ 2) Mia said, ‘We are leaving today.’ 3) Sam asked, ‘Where is the platform?’ 4) Nina said, ‘I can meet you here.’

rubric.reference_answer: 1) Leo said that he had lost his ticket. 2) Mia said that they were leaving that day. 3) Sam asked where the platform was. 4) Nina said that she could meet me there.

title: Reported Speech: курс
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Report the statements: 1) Kim said, ‘I don't understand this task.’ 2) Dan said, ‘I watched the lecture last night.’ 3) Amy asked, ‘Have you submitted the essay?’ 4) Rob said, ‘I may join later.’

rubric.reference_answer: 1) Kim said that she didn't understand that task. 2) Dan said that he had watched the lecture the previous night. 3) Amy asked if/whether I had submitted the essay. 4) Rob said that he might join later.

title: Reported Speech: офис
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Report the statements: 1) Ann said, ‘I am working here now.’ 2) Joe said, ‘We bought this printer yesterday.’ 3) Ben asked, ‘When will the meeting start?’ 4) Liz said, ‘I must finish today.’

rubric.reference_answer: 1) Ann said that she was working there then. 2) Joe said that they had bought that printer the day before. 3) Ben asked when the meeting would start. 4) Liz said that she had to finish that day.

title: Reported Speech: интервью
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Report the statements: 1) Sara said, ‘I have worked abroad.’ 2) Mark said, ‘I left my job last month.’ 3) The manager asked, ‘Can you start tomorrow?’ 4) Sara said, ‘I will think about it.’

rubric.reference_answer: 1) Sara said that she had worked abroad. 2) Mark said that he had left his job the previous month. 3) The manager asked if/whether I could start the next day. 4) Sara said that she would think about it.

title: Reported Speech: новости
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Report the statements: 1) Ian said, ‘The storm is getting worse.’ 2) Fay said, ‘They closed the road this morning.’ 3) Lee asked, ‘Is the airport open?’ 4) Ian said, ‘We might stay here tonight.’

rubric.reference_answer: 1) Ian said that the storm was getting worse. 2) Fay said that they had closed the road that morning. 3) Lee asked if/whether the airport was open. 4) Ian said that they might stay there that night.

title: Модальные глаголы предположения: офис
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Choose must, might/could, can't or a past form: 1) Her laptop is here; she ___ be nearby. 2) The office is locked; they ___ be inside. 3) I am unsure; he ___ know the answer. 4) The file appeared overnight; Maya ___ have uploaded it.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) must; 2) can't; 3) might/could; 4) must have.
common_errors: пропущено have в выводе о прошлом

title: Модальные глаголы предположения: дорога
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Choose must, might/could, can't or a past form: 1) The road is wet; it ___ have rained. 2) His car is gone; he ___ be at home. 3) This route ___ be faster, but I am unsure. 4) She arrived in ten minutes; she ___ have walked.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) must have; 2) can't; 3) might/could; 4) can't have.
common_errors: пропущено have в выводе о прошлом

title: Модальные глаголы предположения: доставка
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Choose must, might/could, can't or a past form: 1) The parcel is marked delivered; it ___ be downstairs. 2) The address is wrong; this ___ be my order. 3) The courier ___ have called, but I am not certain. 4) The box is empty; someone ___ have opened it.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) must; 2) can't; 3) might/could have; 4) must have.
common_errors: пропущено have в выводе о прошлом

title: Модальные глаголы предположения: экзамен
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Choose must, might/could, can't or a past form: 1) She got every answer right; she ___ know the topic well. 2) He was abroad; he ___ have attended in person. 3) I am unsure; the result ___ change. 4) Their names are absent; they ___ have registered.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) must; 2) can't have; 3) might/could; 4) can't have.
common_errors: пропущено have в выводе о прошлом

subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Choose must, might/could, can't or a past form: 1) Everyone is seated; the talk ___ be starting. 2) The room is empty; this ___ be the right venue. 3) Alex ___ arrive later; he has not confirmed. 4) The slides are ready; Priya ___ have finished them.

title: Relative Clauses: профессии и техника
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Combine: 1) The engineer designed the bridge. She won an award. 2) My phone is waterproof. It cost £300. 3) This is the studio. We recorded the podcast there. 4) Leo lives in York. He is my cousin.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) The engineer who designed the bridge won an award. 2) My phone, which cost £300, is waterproof. 3) This is the studio where/in which we recorded the podcast. 4) Leo, who lives in York, is my cousin.

title: Relative Clauses: работа
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Combine: 1) Employees work remotely. They need secure access. 2) Our director speaks Japanese. She joined in May. 3) The office has closed. We met there. 4) The tool saves time. It was released yesterday.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) Employees who work remotely need secure access. 2) Our director, who joined in May, speaks Japanese. 3) The office where/in which we met has closed. 4) The tool, which was released yesterday, saves time.

title: Relative Clauses: путешествие
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Combine: 1) The guide helped us. He grew up locally. 2) Kyoto has many temples. It was once Japan's capital. 3) That is the hotel. We stayed there. 4) Travellers book early. They get lower prices.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) The guide who grew up locally helped us. 2) Kyoto, which was once Japan's capital, has many temples. 3) That is the hotel where/in which we stayed. 4) Travellers who book early get lower prices.

title: Relative Clauses: образование
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Combine: 1) The tutor teaches grammar. She wrote this book. 2) The course is free. It lasts six weeks. 3) The library is being renovated. We usually study there. 4) Students ask questions. They learn faster.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) The tutor who wrote this book teaches grammar. 2) The course, which lasts six weeks, is free. 3) The library where/in which we usually study is being renovated. 4) Students who ask questions learn faster.

title: Relative Clauses: технологии
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Combine: 1) The developer fixed the bug. He joined yesterday. 2) My tablet has stopped working. It is only a year old. 3) This is the page. Users reset passwords there. 4) Apps collect less data. They earn more trust.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) The developer who joined yesterday fixed the bug. 2) My tablet, which is only a year old, has stopped working. 3) This is the page where/in which users reset passwords. 4) Apps which collect less data earn more trust.

title: Relative Clauses: культура
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Combine: 1) The actor played Hamlet. He visited our school. 2) The film won three awards. It was shot locally. 3) The theatre has reopened. We saw the play there. 4) Artists challenge conventions. They often face criticism.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) The actor who played Hamlet visited our school. 2) The film, which was shot locally, won three awards. 3) The theatre where/in which we saw the play has reopened. 4) Artists who challenge conventions often face criticism.

title: Gerund и Infinitive: намерения

instructions: Complete: 1) I decided ___ (apply) today. 2) She avoids ___ (drive) at night. 3) Remember ___ (lock) the door. 4) I remember ___ (visit) this place as a child.
